failures.description: The agent made an invalid ProductCatalogSearch invocation: it omitted the required item_id and supplied product_id as integer 0 instead of the provided string product_id.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the price of item 1345513440, and the coordinator had the required item_id and product_id as strings. The required next action was to call ProductCatalogSearch with both item_id="1345513440" and product_id="1762337868". Instead, the agent prepared/called the tool with {"product_id": 0}, omitting item_id and using the wrong type for product_id. The tool then explicitly returned a SchemaError confirming the invocation was malformed.
